name: recall_container_ports_maps_cm7
description: RECALL case — expected to FAIL pre-RAG-rewrite. Real eMASS BoE file under 04.CM/: a script(1) capture of `podman ps` and `podman port` showing the running container set and exposed ports. Restricting running services/containers to the minimum necessary is CM-7 (Least Functionality); the documented running set also supports CM-8 (Component Inventory). Body has NO control ID / CCI / doc number; container vocabulary ('podman ps', 'CONTAINER ID', '0.0.0.0:8443->8443/tcp') has near-zero overlap with 'least functionality'. Current tagger → zero tags. Distractor AC-3 present as precision guard.

objectives.text: The organization configures the information system to provide only essential capabilities and prohibits or restricts the use of unnecessary functions, ports, protocols, and services.
objectives.implementation_guidance: Restrict running services and exposed ports to the minimum necessary.
objectives.assessment_procedures: Examine the running services and exposed ports.

objectives.text: The organization develops and documents an inventory of information system components.
The information system enforces approved authorizations for logical access.

evidence.title: Container running set capture
evidence.text:
Script started on 2026-03-12 08:50:00-0500
[root@app01 ~]# podman ps --format 'table {{.Names}} {{.Image}} {{.Ports}} {{.Status}}'
NAMES        IMAGE                              PORTS                      STATUS
api-gw       registry.local/api-gw:2.4.1        0.0.0.0:8443->8443/tcp     Up 9 days
redis        registry.local/redis:7.2           127.0.0.1:6379->6379/tcp   Up 9 days
worker       registry.local/worker:2.4.1                                   Up 9 days
[root@app01 ~]# podman info --format '{{.Host.Security.Rootless}}'
true
[root@app01 ~]# ss -tlnp | grep -E '8443|6379'
LISTEN 0 511 0.0.0.0:8443 0.0.0.0:*
LISTEN 0 511 127.0.0.1:6379 0.0.0.0:*
[root@app01 ~]# exit
Script done on 2026-03-12 08:51:20-0500
